## Problem

What user problem should this solve?

## Proposed Change

Describe the change simply.

## Why It Matters

How does this help users get more out of their payments?

## Product Fit

How does this fit the PayDirt tone and roadmap?

## Extra Context

Add examples, mockups, or related files/issues here.
